scripts.build: npm run build -w @filepacks/core && npm run build -w filepacks
scripts.docs:validate: npm_config_yes=true npx -p node@22 -c 'cd docs && mint validate'
scripts.docs:links: npm_config_yes=true npx -p node@22 -c 'cd docs && mint broken-links'
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:cli
